'''Trep Reskan''' was formally a [[Bacrana System Defense Force|BSDF]] [[General/Legends|General]] before he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] following the [[Amma protest]] massacre. He served as the commander of [[Brak Sector Force|Alliance military forces]] in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
